title: Spicy Freekeh Bowl with Fiesta Chicken
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with spicy freekeh, grilled fiesta chicken, and a tangy marinade sauce.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together marinade and fiesta seasoning.
3. Add chicken to the marinade mixture and coat evenly.
4. Grill chicken for 5-6 minutes per side or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
5. While chicken is grilling, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Add freekeh to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes or until lightly toasted.
7. Fluff freekeh with a fork and set aside.
8. Once chicken is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
9. To assemble the bowls, divide the freekeh among six bowls.
10. Top each bowl with sliced chicken, a drizzle of marinade sauce, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
